title: Granicus Pipeline Config
description: Schema for pipeline.yaml — the Granicus pipeline definition file.

functions_dir.description: Directory containing shared SQL functions/macros available to all SQL assets.

resources.description: Named resources (external system connections). Each key is the resource name.

datasets.description: Maps layer names to BigQuery dataset names. Assets with a matching layer use this dataset.

sources.description: Named external source tables with optional contracts. Each key is the source name.

assets.description: Ordered list of pipeline assets to execute.

resource.description: Resource definition for an external data system.

credentials.description: Path to service account JSON credentials file.

prefix.description: Object key prefix within the bucket.

credentials.description: Path to service account JSON credentials file.

additionalProperties.description: Additional resource properties passed through to the driver.

source.description: An external source table with optional data contract.

resource.description: Name of a resource defined in the resources block.

identifier.description: Dataset or schema identifier that qualifies the source tables (e.g. 'stdlocal', 'project.dataset').

tables.description: List of table names available from this source.

primary_key.description: Primary key column for freshness and completeness checks.

expected_freshness.description: Maximum acceptable age of source data before alerting (e.g. '24h').

expected_columns.description: Columns that must exist in the source table (contract check).

check.description: Data quality check attached to an asset. Returns rows on failure; zero rows means pass.

source.description: Path to the SQL file implementing the check.

blocking.description: When true, a check failure blocks downstream assets. Defaults to false.

foreign_key.description: Referential integrity constraint on an asset column.

column.description: Column in this asset that holds the foreign key value.

nullable.description: When true, NULL values in the FK column are permitted and not treated as orphans. Defaults to false.

completeness_exclusion.description: A set of rows excluded from (or added to) completeness counting.

table.description: Table name containing the exclusion/addition rows.

pk.description: Primary key column in the referenced table.

filter.description: Optional SQL WHERE clause to further filter rows within the table.

completeness.description: Checks that the asset contains a sufficient fraction of rows from a source table.

source_table.description: The authoritative source table to compare against.

source_pk.description: Primary key column in the source table.

exclusions.description: Rows in the source that are expected to be absent from this asset.

additions.description: Rows not in the source that are expected to appear in this asset.

tolerance.description: Fraction of source rows allowed to be missing before failing. Defaults to 0.01 (1%).

known_exclusions.description: Explicit list of primary key values known to be absent from this asset.

standards.description: Column-level format standards. Named columns are checked against the specified standard.

email.description: Column names that must contain valid email addresses.

phone.description: Column names that must contain standardized phone numbers.

currency.description: Column names that must contain valid currency amounts (NUMERIC with 2 decimal places).

retry.description: Per-asset retry policy on transient errors.

max_attempts.description: Total number of attempts including the first. Defaults to 3. Set to 0 to use the default.

backoff_base.description: Base duration for exponential backoff between retries. Defaults to '10s'.

retryable_errors.description: Error categories that trigger a retry. Defaults to ['rate_limit', 'quota', 'network'].

asset.description: A single pipeline asset — a SQL model, Python script, shell script, or dlt source.

name.description: Asset identifier. Inferred from the source filename (without extension) if omitted.

type.description: Execution type. Required and must be one of: sql, python, shell, dlt.

source.description: Path to the SQL file, Python file, or shell script relative to the pipeline root.

destination_resource.description: Resource name where this asset writes its output. Required for sql assets.

source_resource.description: Resource name for reading source data (used by dlt and some python assets).

layer.description: Pipeline layer. Used to resolve the destination dataset from the datasets block.

grain.description: Comma-separated column name(s) that uniquely identify a row (e.g. 'order_id' or 'date,campaign_id').

default_checks.description: Enable auto-generated checks based on grain, foreign_keys, and standards.

default_checks_blocking.description: When true, auto-generated check failures block downstream assets. Defaults to false.

partition_by.description: Column name used for BigQuery table partitioning. Required when partition_type is set.

cluster_by.description: Columns used for BigQuery table clustering.

foreign_keys.description: Referential integrity constraints checked by default_checks.

upstream.description: Asset names this asset depends on. Used to build the execution DAG.

primary_upstream.description: The single most important upstream asset (for lineage display and completeness checks).

min_retention_ratio.description: Minimum fraction of upstream rows that must appear in this asset. Defaults to 0.5.

fan_out_check.description: When true, checks that this asset does not produce more rows than its primary upstream.

standards_blocking.description: When true, standards check failures block downstream assets. Defaults to false.

timeout.description: Maximum wall-clock time allowed for this asset to complete (e.g. '30m').

depends_on.description: Additional asset names that must complete before this asset runs (supplemental to upstream).

checks.description: Explicit data quality checks run after this asset materializes.
